name: codex-loop
description: Loop-driven Codex plugin for modular multi-agent project delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Run PRD, development, evaluation, and repair loops in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Loop turns a repository goal into a file-backed PRD, task graph, bounded development loop, evaluator pass, repair cycle, context capsule, and final delivery report. This local development manifest reserves future skills, MCP, and hooks surfaces without implementing those modules early.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Loop to turn this goal into a PRD, task graph, implementation loop, evaluator loop, and final delivery report.
Run a modular PRD → Dev → Eval → Repair loop for this repository and stop only when validation evidence supports completion.
